sentences.arabic: إِنَّ رِيَادَةَ الْأَعْمَالِ تُمَثِّلُ الْقُوَّةَ الدَّافِعَةَ لِلِابْتِكَارِ فِي الِاقْتِصَادِ الْحَدِيثِ، إِذْ تَعْتَمِدُ عَلَى تَحْوِيلِ الْأَفْكَارِ الْإِبْدَاعِيَّةِ إِلَى مَشَارِيعَ مَلْمُوسَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Preduzetništvo predstavlja pokretačku snagu inovacija u modernoj ekonomiji, jer se oslanja na pretvaranje kreativnih ideja u konkretne projekte.
sentences.translationEn: Entrepreneurship represents the driving force for innovation in the modern economy, as it relies on transforming creative ideas into tangible projects.

sentences.arabic: وَيَتَطَلَّبُ النَّجَاحُ فِي هَذَا الْمِضْمَارِ رُؤْيَةً ثَاقِبَةً وَقُدْرَةً عَالِيَةً عَلَى تَحَمُّلِ الْمَخَاطِرِ الْمَحْسُوبَةِ فِي سُوقٍ دَائِمِ التَّغَيُّرِ.
sentences.translation: Uspjeh na ovom polju zahtijeva oštru viziju i visoku sposobnost preuzimanja proračunatih rizika na tržištu koje se stalno mijenja.
sentences.translationEn: Success in this field requires keen vision and a high ability to take calculated risks in a constantly changing market.

sentences.arabic: كَمَا يَجِبُ عَلَى الرِّيَادِيِّ أَنْ يُتْقِنَ مَهَارَاتِ التَّخْطِيطِ الِاسْتِرَاتِيجِيِّ وَإِدَارَةِ الْمَوَارِدِ لِضَمَانِ اسْتِدَامَةِ الْمَشْرُوعِ وَنُمُوِّهِ.
sentences.translation: Takođe, preduzetnik mora savladati vještine strateškog planiranja i upravljanja resursima kako bi osigurao održivost i rast projekta.
sentences.translationEn: The entrepreneur must also master strategic planning and resource management skills to ensure the project's sustainability and growth.

sentences.arabic: وَلَا يُمْكِنُ إِغْفَالُ دَوْرِ التَّكْنُولُوجْيَا فِي فَتْحِ آفَاقٍ جَدِيدَةٍ لِلشَّرِكَاتِ النَّاشِئَةِ لِلْوُصُولِ إِلَى قَاعِدَةِ عُمَلَاءَ عَالَمِيَّةٍ.
sentences.translation: Ne smije se zanemariti ni uloga tehnologije u otvaranju novih horizonata za startap kompanije kako bi dosegle globalnu bazu kupaca.
sentences.translationEn: The role of technology in opening new horizons for startups to reach a global customer base cannot be overlooked.

sentences.arabic: لِذَا، فَإِنَّ دَعْمَ الشَّبَابِ وَتَوْفِيرَ الْبِيئَةِ التَّشْرِيعِيَّةِ الْمُنَاسِبَةِ يُعَدُّ اسْتِثْمَارًا طَوِيلَ الْأَمَدِ فِي رَخَاءِ الْمُجْتَمَعِ.
sentences.translation: Stoga se podrška mladima i obezbjeđivanje odgovarajućeg zakonodavnog okvira smatraju dugoročnom investicijom u prosperitet društva.
sentences.translationEn: Therefore, supporting youth and providing the appropriate legislative environment is a long-term investment in the prosperity of society.
